arts.ttl: Exeter City hoping to book their spot in FA Cup third round
arts.sum: Exeter have their own story to tell on FA Cup replays – it was that goalless draw with Manchester United and subsequent replay at St James Park that helped save the football club back in 2005 – but the Grecians are not alone. “You’ve seen over the years the drawn games that give them that lucrative tie away from home, or whatever it is, and it actually saves some football clubs in terms of the finance that it provides.

arts.ttl: Preview: Exeter City vs. Chesterfield - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's FA Cup clash between Exeter City and Chesterfield, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
